articles.title: Teen found dismembered in Chelsea parking lot is identified 26 years later
articles.description:
Though her killer was quickly charged and sentenced, it took authorities more than two decades to identify 16-year-old Tiffany Bradley.

The post Teen found dismembered in Chelsea parking lot is identified 26 years later appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Authorities identified 16-year-old Tiffany Bradley, found dismembered in Chelsea, 26 years later.
Her killer was charged and sentenced shortly after the crime in 1996.
This case highlights ongoing challenges in cold case investigations for Boston residents.

articles.title: House approves war powers resolution to halt military action against Iran, in a rebuke of Trump
articles.description:
The roll call Wednesday was 215-208, but next steps are uncertain. The tally, with four Republicans joining Democrats, was a rebuke of the president's war strategy, and cheers erupted in the House chamber.

The post House approves war powers resolution to halt military action against Iran, in a rebuke of Trump appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: House passes war powers resolution with a vote of 215-208 on June 3.
Four Republicans joined Democrats in rebuking Trump's military strategy against Iran.
Boston residents may see shifts in military funding and local defense contracts.
